headline: Witkoff Tangoes Putin вһЎпёҸ Miami Zelensky BBQ рҹ”ҘрҹҚ–
text:
US dealmaker Steve Witkoff рҹ’јрҹ•ә just GRILLED рҹ”Ҙ Vladimir PUTIN рҹҗ»рҹҮ·рҹҮә for 5 HOURS вҸ°рҹҳ© in Moscow Kremlin crib рҹҸ°вқ„пёҸ вҖ“ ZERO COMPROMISE рҹ’Ҙрҹҡ« on Ukraine war endgame, but Trump рҹҚҠрҹ‘‘ calls it 'REASONABLY GOOD' vibes вңЁ with son-in-law Jared Kushner рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’јрҹ’Қ tagging along like family reunion drama рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘Ұ! Putin dropping BOMBS рҹ’Ј: 'DONBAS OR BUST рҹ—әпёҸрҹ”Ҙ вҖ“ either we CONQUER рҹ’Әвҡ”пёҸ or Ukies GTFO рҹҸғвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Ё!' Trump spills tea вҳ•: 'Putin WANTS war over рҹҳҢвңҢпёҸ, that's the VIBE boys!' But Ukrainian FM Andrii Sybhia рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’јрҹҮәрҹҮҰ RAGING рҹҳЎ 'WASTING WORLD'S TIME вҸірҹӨЎ!' Ambassador Olga Stefanishyna рҹ’ғрҹҮәрҹҮҰ admits 'NOT MUCH PROGRESS рҹ“үрҹҳў' but Ukraine LOCKED IN рҹ”’ for JUST PEACE рҹ•ҠпёҸрҹ’Ә вҖ“ Zelensky рҹ§”рҹҡҖ hyping on X рҹҗҰ 'REAL CHANCE TO END THIS SHIT рҹҺү but PRESSURE RUSSIA HARD рҹ«ёрҹҮ·рҹҮә!'

Now Witkoff вһЎпёҸ Miami beach vibes рҹҸ–пёҸрҹҚ№ THURSDAY рҹ—“пёҸ to tango рҹ’ғрҹ•ә with Ukraine's Rustem Umerov рҹӣЎпёҸ вҖ“ White House CONFIRMS рҹ“ўвң… after Moscow no-deal saltiness рҹ§ӮрҹҳӨ! Putin aide Yuri Ushakov рҹӨөрҹ“ң says US proposals 'MEH OKAY рҹӨ·вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ' but BIG STICKS рҹҡ« on territory grabs рҹ—әпёҸрҹ’Ј and NATO NO-NO рҹҡ«рҹҮәрҹҮҰ. Trump already SIMPING? Nah, he HATES NATO invite for Kyiv рҹҳ рҹҡӘ вҖ“ Russia STRONK рҹ’Ә from Pokrovsk wins рҹҸҶвҡ”пёҸ, snagging 701 SQ KM рҹҚ‘рҹ“Ҳ in Nov per ISW nerds рҹ“Ҡрҹ”¬, now owning 19.3% Ukraine real estate рҹҸ рҹҮ·рҹҮә!

Putin in camo drip рҹӘ–рҹҳҺ flexing at command post рҹ“Ў claiming city conquests рҹҸ°рҹ”Ҙ вҖ“ RUSKIES STEPPING UP рҹҰөрҹ“Ҳ! Macron рҹҘҗрҹҮ«рҹҮ· in Beijing begging Xi рҹ‘‘рҹҮЁрҹҮі 'HELP CEASEFIRE PLZ рҹҷҸрҹ•ҠпёҸ!' Europe BIG MAD рҹҳЎ at Putin accusing them of COCKBLOCKING рҹӣ‘ US-Russia bromance рҹ‘¬ вҖ“ UK calls it 'KREMLIN CLAPTRAP рҹӨЎрҹ’©!' NATO boss Mark Rutte рҹ•¶пёҸ in Brussels: 'Talks GOOD рҹ‘Қ but ARM UKRAINE TO THE TEETH рҹҰ·рҹ’Ҙ!'

EU cooking вӮ¬90BN LOAN рҹ’°рҹ”Ҙ for Ukraine guns n' basics using FROZEN RUSSIAN ASSETS рҹӨ‘рҹҡ«рҹҮ·рҹҮә вҖ“ Belgium SIMPing out рҹҳ°вҡ–пёҸ, ECB NOPE-ing рҹ‘Һ, down from вӮ¬140BN but STILL THICC рҹҚ‘! Putin ready for MORE TALKS рҹ”„рҹӨқ 'AS MANY AS NEEDED вҸі' while Europe DITCHES Rus gas by 2027 рҹҡ«вӣҪ вҖ“ Trump's 2nd term PEACE DANCE рҹ•әрҹҚҠ or WW3 remix? Zelensky betting on PRESSURE рҹ”ЁрҹҮ·рҹҮә to make Putler fold like cheap lawn chair! рҹ’ҘрҹҳӮ
